Constructed keeping all the norms in mind, this house is approved by RWA/Co-operative Housing Society. Known for its strategic location in Margondanahalli, the ready to move independent house can be availed at a price starting from ₹4.80 Cr. Visit this 5 BHK property at Standalone Building AR Nakshatra DMR Layout 1st Main Margondanahalli Near New Baldwin International School Bangalore., Margondanahalli, Bangalore - East, Karnataka. resultList.dtldesc: Nestled in the vibrant neighbourhood of Margondanahalli, Bangalore, this spacious 5 BHK residential house offers an exceptional blend of luxury and convenience.Property Specifications This stunning 5 BHK residential house offers an impressive super built-up area of 7,800 sq ft and a generous carpet area of 4,850 sqft, making it an ideal home for families seeking spacious and luxurious living. Spread across four levels, the property features a ground floor and three additional floors connected by an internal staircase, ensuring seamless movement throughout the home.On the ground floor, youll find two well-appointed bedrooms, complemented by three bathroomstwo attached and one commonall designed in a modern western style, equipped with geysers and solar water heating. The living room and dining area are perfect for family gatherings, while the pooja room, store room, and a modular kitchen with a chimney provide practical amenities for daily life.The first floor boasts three additional bedrooms, each with its own attached western bathroom, ensuring privacy and convenience. This level also features a gym room for fitness enthusiasts, a home theatre for entertainment, and a lovely garden area complete with a Bar Dosa counter, perfect for hosting friends and family. The second floor includes one bedroom with an attached bathroom, along with another modular kitchen and a stage designed for events. Two balconies provide stunning viewsone attached to the bedroom and another common balcony overlooking the road and garden.The third floor features a lift room and a servant room for added convenience. With piped gas connection and a utility space attached to the kitchen, this home is designed for modern living. The flooring throughout is a mix of granite, marble, vitrified tiles, and wood, adding an elegant touch to each space. Vaastu compliant and facing north, this exceptional property combines luxury with functionality.Facilities This residential house has exceptional facilities for modern living. It includes two covered and four open parking spaces, reliable water supply from both borewell and corporation, and 100 power backup. CCTV surveillance enhances security, while a lift provides easy access to all floors. Residents can also enjoy a dedicated gym, making it convenient to maintain an active lifestyle at home. Locality New Baldwins International School serves as a notable landmark, making the area ideal for families with children. Several hospitals are located within a kilometre. Nearby malls and supermarkets cater to daily shopping needs, while banks and ATMs provide convenient financial services. Public transport options are readily available, enhancing connectivity within the city. K R Puram Railway Station and K R Puram Metro Station are both just 2 km away.

resultList.dtldesc: Presenting a thoughtfully designed 3 BHK residential apartment in the well-established Mahaveer Amaze project located in Seegehalli, Bangalore. This ready-to-move home offers a comfortable and modern living experience within a premium gated community developed by Mahaveer Group, known for its quality construction and reliable planning. The apartment is ideal for families seeking a peaceful yet well-connected neighbourhood with access to key urban conveniences.Property SpecificationsThis spacious residence offers a super built-up area of 1419 sq. ft. and is situated on the 2nd floor of a low-rise structure with only two floors, ensuring privacy and limited density living. The apartment is designed with an efficient layout comprising three well-proportioned bedrooms, three bathrooms, and multiple balconies that enhance natural light and ventilation throughout the home.The property is semi-furnished, allowing flexibility for personal customisation while already offering essential fittings for comfortable living. It is an east-facing unit, considered auspicious and well-ventilated, with thoughtfully planned interiors that optimise usable space. The project features lift access and dedicated parking provision for residents, ensuring convenience in daily living.Being part of Mahaveer Amaze, the home benefits from a well-maintained residential environment with structured planning and a peaceful community atmosphere. The construction quality reflects durability and modern standards, making it suitable for long-term occupancy.FacilitiesResidents can enjoy essential modern amenities including lift access, power backup provisions, security systems, and reserved parking. The gated community setup ensures safety and a controlled environment for families. The project is designed to support a comfortable lifestyle with adequate infrastructure and maintained common areas.LocalitySituated in Seegehalli, the property enjoys strong connectivity to major parts of East Bangalore including Whitefield and KR Puram. The location offers easy access to schools, hospitals, and daily convenience stores, making it a practical residential choice. The area is well connected through road networks and public transport options, ensuring smooth commuting to IT hubs and commercial centres.The neighbourhood is rapidly developing with improved infrastructure, adding long-term value to the property. Its proximity to employment zones and essential services makes it suitable for both end-users and investors.
